revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - update – add flag aliases
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Réunion | flag alias = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-local = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-local2 = Proposed flag of Réunion (ARF).svg | flag alias-nationalist = Proposed flag of Réunion (Nationalist movement).svg | flag alias-MLK = Unofficial flag of Reunion (MLK).svg | flag alias-football = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-futsal = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-gov = | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = local | var2 = local2 | var3 = nationalist | var4 = MLK<!-- | var5 = gov--> | redir1 = REU | cat = Reunion </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Réunion | flag alias = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-local = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-local2 = Proposed flag of Réunion (ARF).svg | flag alias-nationalist = Proposed flag of Réunion (Nationalist movement).svg | flag alias-MLK = Unofficial flag of Reunion (MLK).svg | flag alias-football = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-futsal = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-gov = | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = local | var2 = local2 | var3 = nationalist | var4 = MLK<!-- | var5 = gov--> | redir1 = REU | cat = Reunion </noinclude> }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Réunion | flag alias = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-local = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-local2 = Proposed flag of Réunion (ARF).svg | flag alias-nationalist = Proposed flag of Réunion (Nationalist movement).svg | flag alias-MLK = Unofficial flag of Reunion (MLK).svg | flag alias-football = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-futsal = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-gov = | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = local | var2 = local2 | var3 = nationalist | var4 = MLK<!-- | var5 = gov--> | redir1 = REU | cat = Reunion </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_R%C3%A9union here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_R%C3%A9union for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Réunion | flag alias = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-local = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-local2 = Proposed flag of Réunion (ARF).svg | flag alias-nationalist = Proposed flag of Réunion (Nationalist movement).svg | flag alias-MLK = Unofficial flag of Reunion (MLK).svg | flag alias-football = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-futsal = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-gov = | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = local | var2 = local2 | var3 = nationalist | var4 = MLK<!-- | var5 = gov--> | redir1 = REU | cat = Reunion </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24919637890|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_R%C3%A9union for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Réunion | flag alias = Flag of France.svg | flag alias-local = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-local2 = Proposed flag of Réunion (ARF).svg | flag alias-nationalist = Proposed flag of Réunion (Nationalist movement).svg | flag alias-MLK = Unofficial flag of Reunion (MLK).svg | flag alias-football = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-beach soccer = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-futsal = Proposed flag of Réunion (VAR).svg | flag alias-gov = | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = local | var2 = local2 | var3 = nationalist | var4 = MLK | redir1 = REU | cat = Reunion </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
